시편 107:1.content: Give thanks to Yahweh, for he is good, for his loving kindness endures forever.

시편 107:2.content: Let the redeemed by Yahweh say so, whom he has redeemed from the hand of the adversary,

시편 107:3.content: And gathered out of the lands, from the east and from the west, from the north and from the south.

시편 107:4.content: They wandered in the wilderness in a desert way. They found no city to live in.

시편 107:5.content: Hungry and thirsty, their soul fainted in them.

시편 107:6.content: Then they cried to Yahweh in their trouble, and he delivered them out of their distresses,

시편 107:7.content: he led them also by a straight way, that they might go to a city to live in.

시편 107:8.content: Let them praise Yahweh for his loving kindness, for his wonderful deeds to the children of men!

시편 107:9.content: For he satisfies the longing soul. He fills the hungry soul with good.

시편 107:10.content: Some sat in darkness and in the shadow of death, being bound in affliction and iron,

시편 107:11.content: because they rebelled against the words of God, and condemned the counsel of the Most High.

시편 107:12.content: Therefore he brought down their heart with labor. They fell down, and there was no one to help.

시편 107:13.content: Then they cried to Yahweh in their trouble, and he saved them out of their distresses.

시편 107:14.content: He brought them out of darkness and the shadow of death, and broke away their chains.

시편 107:15.content: Let them praise Yahweh for his loving kindness, for his wonderful deeds to the children of men!

시편 107:16.content: For he has broken the gates of bronze, and cut through bars of iron.

시편 107:17.content: Fools are afflicted because of their disobedience, and because of their iniquities.

시편 107:18.content: Their soul abhors all kinds of food. They draw near to the gates of death.

시편 107:19.content: Then they cry to Yahweh in their trouble, he saves them out of their distresses.

시편 107:20.content: He sends his word, and heals them, and delivers them from their graves.

시편 107:21.content: Let them praise Yahweh for his loving kindness, for his wonderful deeds to the children of men!

시편 107:22.content: Let them offer the sacrifices of thanksgiving, and declare his deeds with singing.

시편 107:23.content: Those who go down to the sea in ships, who do business in great waters;

시편 107:24.content: These see Yahweh’s deeds, and his wonders in the deep.

시편 107:25.content: For he commands, and raises the stormy wind, which lifts up its waves.

시편 107:26.content: They mount up to the sky; they go down again to the depths. Their soul melts away because of trouble.

시편 107:27.content: They reel back and forth, and stagger like a drunken man, and are at their wits’ end.

시편 107:28.content: Then they cry to Yahweh in their trouble, and he brings them out of their distress.

시편 107:29.content: He makes the storm a calm, so that its waves are still.

시편 107:30.content: Then they are glad because it is calm, so he brings them to their desired haven.

시편 107:31.content: Let them praise Yahweh for his loving kindness, for his wonderful deeds for the children of men!

시편 107:32.content: Let them exalt him also in the assembly of the people, and praise him in the seat of the elders.

시편 107:33.content: He turns rivers into a desert, water springs into a thirsty ground,

시편 107:34.content: and a fruitful land into a salt waste, for the wickedness of those who dwell in it.

시편 107:35.content: He turns a desert into a pool of water, and a dry land into water springs.

시편 107:36.content: There he makes the hungry live, that they may prepare a city to live in,

시편 107:37.content: sow fields, plant vineyards, and reap the fruits of increase.

시편 107:38.content: He blesses them also, so that they are multiplied greatly. He doesn’t allow their livestock to decrease.

시편 107:39.content: Again, they are diminished and bowed down through oppression, trouble, and sorrow.

시편 107:40.content: He pours contempt on princes, and causes them to wander in a trackless waste.

시편 107:41.content: Yet he lifts the needy out of their affliction, and increases their families like a flock.

시편 107:42.content: The upright will see it, and be glad. All the wicked will shut their mouths.

시편 107:43.content: Whoever is wise will pay attention to these things. They will consider the loving kindnesses of Yahweh.
